title: INT8 quantization Rust module
description:
Implement weight-only INT8 quantization for the CausalLM model.

src/quantization/int8.rs:
- quantize_model(model: &CausalLM) → QuantizedCausalLM
- Quantize all Linear layers to INT8 (weights only, activations stay f32)
- Per-channel quantization of weight matrices

src/quantization/quantized_linear.rs:
- QuantizedLinear: stores INT8 weights + f32 scales
- Forward: call INT8 GEMM via Zig FFI (or dequantize-on-the-fly)

src/quantization/calibration.rs:
- MinMaxCalibration: per-channel min/max from weight values
- PercentileCalibration: clip outlier channels

src/quantization/mod.rs: re-exports

Tests (mandatory):
- Quantize a model, verify INT8 weights stored with correct scales
- QuantizedLinear forward produces output within 1% of f32 Linear
- MinMax calibration computes correct scales
- Quantized model has ~50% memory of f32 model

Pass/fail:
- INT8 output within 1% of f32
- Memory reduction ~50%
- Calibration produces valid scales
